note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right buttock wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right buttock measures 6.0 cm x 5.0 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 43% slough, 57% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right buttock — improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Nutritional consult ordered.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right buttock wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right buttock measures 6.0 cm x 5.0 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 75% slough, 25% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right buttock — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
